title: The Depths of Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 0–3.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: But you idiots still came at me...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: reporting from the passage to level 3.

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: i don't want... to be tortured...!!!

dialogue.text: A cornered rat can be fearsome....!!

dialogue.text: It must be painful... how pitiful....!!!
